summary: Full stack testing of Tom Certo app. All 10 backend API tests pass. Frontend flows (activation, home screen, start detection) all working correctly. Note: TEST-DEV2026 token was missing from DB and had to be seeded manually during testing.

critical.issue: Token TEST-DEV2026 was NOT seeded in MongoDB on startup. Had to create it manually via admin API. App would fail activation on first run without seed data.

react_native_issues.issue: useNativeDriver warnings in web preview (expected - falls back to JS animations)

action_items: Add startup seed script to create TEST-DEV2026 token if it doesn't exist in DB (on_startup event in server.py)
Add README/docs noting seed requirement for fresh deployments
critical_code_review_comments: server.py on_startup does not seed the TEST-DEV2026 token — fresh DB deployments will fail token validation until admin manually creates it
seed_data_creation: Manually created TEST-DEV2026 token via admin API during testing: POST /api/admin/tokens with token_code=TEST-DEV2026, duration_minutes=525600, max_devices=5, customer_name=Teste
context_for_next_testing_agent: Token TEST-DEV2026 now exists in DB. Backend 100% passing. Frontend activation → home → start detection flow working. On web preview, mic access fails gracefully with friendly modal (expected since @siteed/audio-studio is native-only).
rca_of_issue: Missing seed: The TEST-DEV2026 token was not in MongoDB. server.py on_startup only creates indexes, not seed data. Fix: Add upsert logic in on_startup to insert TEST-DEV2026 if not present.
